name: The Dove's Nest Chicken Souffle
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds cooked chicken breasts, cut into small pieces
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
2 cans cream of chicken soup, 10-ounces each
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9x13-inch glass baking dish with half the bread.
2. In a bowl, mix the chicken, olives, eggs, mushrooms, green onions, mayonnaise, curry powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Spoon evenly over the bread; top with the remaining bread.
3. Combine the soup and sour cream in another small bowl; mix well. Spread over the bread layer.
4. Chill, covered, overnight.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour. Let stand for 10 to 15 minutes. Cut into squares to serve.
